requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — Lighting Radio Disturbance (Peru NTP-CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明无线电骚扰（秘鲁 NTP-CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明無線電騷擾（秘魯 NTP-CISPR 15）

summary.en: Peru does not operate an EU-style horizontal EMC Directive that broadly mandates emission compliance for all electrical products. For lighting equipment, the relevant technical reference is the Peruvian NTP adoption of CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), published by INACAL. It covers conducted emissions on the mains terminals and radiated emissions. EMC emission conformity becomes a mandatory market condition only where a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the category in scope. Separately, for any luminaire incorporating a radio transmitter (smart/wireless lighting), spectrum-related EMC and radio conditions are governed by MTC (Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones) homologation — see the smart-luminaire item under the photobio/MTC rows. Products should be assessed for 220 V, 60 Hz mains conditions.
summary.zh: 秘鲁不实施欧盟式横向 EMC 指令，不对所有电气产品普遍强制发射合规。就照明设备而言，相关技术依据是由 INACAL 发布、采用 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）的秘鲁 NTP，涵盖电源端传导发射及辐射发射。仅当技术规范（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布该类别纳入范围时，EMC 发射符合性才成为强制市场条件。此外，对于任何含无线电发射机的灯具（智能/无线照明），与频谱相关的 EMC 及无线电条件由 MTC（交通通信部）型号核准管辖——见光生物/MTC 行中的智能灯具条目。产品应按 220 V、60 Hz 电源条件评估。
summary.zht: 秘魯不實施歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令，不對所有電氣產品普遍強制發射合規。就照明設備而言，相關技術依據是由 INACAL 發布、採用 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）的秘魯 NTP，涵蓋電源端傳導發射及輻射發射。僅當技術規範（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布該類別納入範圍時，EMC 發射符合性才成為強制市場條件。此外，對於任何含無線電發射機的燈具（智能/無線照明），與頻譜相關的 EMC 及無線電條件由 MTC（交通通信部）型號核准管轄——見光生物/MTC 行中的智能燈具條目。產品應按 220 V、60 Hz 電源條件評估。

standards_or_laws: NTP-CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (INACAL adoption of CISPR 15)
Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) where the lighting category is declared in scope
MTC homologation — applies where the luminaire incorporates a radio transmitter

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers safety and EMC for relevant categories), with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are issued under the Chinese conformity system and are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence, but the shared CISPR 15 base means the emission limits and methods overlap closely.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告系在中国合格评定体系下出具，不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据，但因共用 CISPR 15 基础，发射限值与方法高度重叠。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告系在中國合格評定體系下出具，不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據，但因共用 CISPR 15 基礎，發射限值與方法高度重疊。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR; aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both Peru (NTP-CISPR 15) and China (GB 17743) derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits and methods are largely harmonized. Key differences: (1) Peru has no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive — emission compliance is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the lighting category in scope, so exporters must confirm whether their category is regulated; (2) Chinese CCC EMC reports are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence — testing should reference NTP-CISPR 15 / CISPR 15, and an accredited (ILAC-recognised) report eases acceptance; (3) smart luminaires with a radio transmitter additionally require MTC homologation, which Chinese SRRC type approval does not satisfy; (4) tests should reflect 60 Hz mains (China 50 Hz). The practical burden is mainly demonstrating CISPR 15 conformity through evidence acceptable in Peru rather than re-engineering the product.
gap.zh: 秘鲁（NTP-CISPR 15）与中国（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值与方法基本协调。主要差异：（1）秘鲁没有欧盟式横向 EMC 指令——仅当技术规范宣布照明类别纳入范围时，发射合规才为强制，故出口商须确认其类别是否受管制；（2）中国 CCC EMC 报告不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据——检测应引用 NTP-CISPR 15/CISPR 15，且经认可（ILAC 承认）的报告可便于接受；（3）含无线电发射机的智能灯具还须取得 MTC 型号核准，中国 SRRC 型号核准不予满足；（4）检测应反映 60 Hz 电源（中国 50 Hz）。实际负担主要在于通过秘鲁可接受的证据证明 CISPR 15 符合性，而非重新设计产品。
gap.zht: 秘魯（NTP-CISPR 15）與中國（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值與方法基本協調。主要差異：（1）秘魯沒有歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令——僅當技術規範宣布照明類別納入範圍時，發射合規才為強制，故出口商須確認其類別是否受管制；（2）中國 CCC EMC 報告不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據——檢測應引用 NTP-CISPR 15/CISPR 15，且經認可（ILAC 承認）的報告可便於接受；（3）含無線電發射機的智能燈具還須取得 MTC 型號核准，中國 SRRC 型號核准不予滿足；（4）檢測應反映 60 Hz 電源（中國 50 Hz）。實際負擔主要在於通過秘魯可接受的證據證明 CISPR 15 符合性，而非重新設計產品。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive in Peru; NTP-CISPR 15 emission compliance is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the lighting category in scope. MTC homologation applies for radio-transmitter (smart) luminaires.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru has no EU-style horizontal EMC Directive; lighting emission compliance follows NTP-CISPR 15 and is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope. The CISPR 15 base is shared with China's GB 17743, so emission limits overlap closely, but Chinese CCC reports are not accepted as Peruvian evidence — an accredited CISPR 15 report eases acceptance. Smart luminaires with a radio transmitter additionally need MTC homologation (Chinese SRRC does not satisfy it). Assess at 220 V, 60 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁没有欧盟式横向 EMC 指令；照明发射合规依据 NTP-CISPR 15，仅在技术规范宣布该类别纳入范围时为强制。CISPR 15 基础与中国 GB 17743 共用，故发射限值高度重叠，但中国 CCC 报告不被接受为秘鲁证据——经认可的 CISPR 15 报告可便于接受。含无线电发射机的智能灯具还须取得 MTC 型号核准（中国 SRRC 不予满足）。请按 220 V、60 Hz 评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯沒有歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令；照明發射合規依據 NTP-CISPR 15，僅在技術規範宣布該類別納入範圍時為強制。CISPR 15 基礎與中國 GB 17743 共用，故發射限值高度重疊，但中國 CCC 報告不被接受為秘魯證據——經認可的 CISPR 15 報告可便於接受。含無線電發射機的智能燈具還須取得 MTC 型號核准（中國 SRRC 不予滿足）。請按 220 V、60 Hz 評估。

requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——照明设备（秘鲁 NTP-IEC 61547）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——照明設備（秘魯 NTP-IEC 61547）

summary.en: Unlike the EU, Peru has no horizontal EMC Directive that mandates immunity for all electrical equipment. The relevant technical reference for lighting immunity is the Peruvian NTP adoption of IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements), published by INACAL. It addresses immunity to electrostatic discharge, electrical fast transient/burst, surge, conducted RF disturbance, power-frequency magnetic field, and voltage dips/interruptions. Immunity conformity becomes a mandatory market condition only where a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the category in scope; otherwise it is a reference/voluntary NTP. Surge and dip/interruption tests should reflect the Peruvian 220 V, 60 Hz network.
summary.zh: 与欧盟不同，秘鲁没有对所有电气设备强制抗扰度的横向 EMC 指令。照明抗扰度的相关技术依据是由 INACAL 发布、采用 IEC 61547（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）的秘鲁 NTP，涉及对静电放电、电快速瞬变/脉冲群、浪涌、传导射频骚扰、工频磁场及电压暂降/中断的抗扰度。仅当技术规范（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布该类别纳入范围时，抗扰度符合性才成为强制市场条件；否则为参考/自愿性 NTP。浪涌及暂降/中断试验应反映秘鲁 220 V、60 Hz 电网。
summary.zht: 與歐盟不同，秘魯沒有對所有電氣設備強制抗擾度的橫向 EMC 指令。照明抗擾度的相關技術依據是由 INACAL 發布、採用 IEC 61547（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）的秘魯 NTP，涉及對靜電放電、電快速瞬變/脈衝群、浪湧、傳導射頻騷擾、工頻磁場及電壓暫降/中斷的抗擾度。僅當技術規範（Reglamento Tecnico，PRODUCE/INDECOPI）宣布該類別納入範圍時，抗擾度符合性才成為強制市場條件；否則為參考/自願性 NTP。浪湧及暫降/中斷試驗應反映秘魯 220 V、60 Hz 電網。

standards_or_laws: NTP-IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (INACAL adoption of IEC 61547)
Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) where the lighting category is declared in scope

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is less strictly enforced than the Chinese emissions standard GB 17743; CCC for luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity. Chinese immunity test reports under GB/T 18595 are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence, but the shared IEC 61547 base means the test content overlaps.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743；针对灯具的 CCC 通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。中国 GB/T 18595 下的抗扰度检测报告不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据，但因共用 IEC 61547 基础，检测内容重叠。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743；針對燈具的 CCC 通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。中國 GB/T 18595 下的抗擾度檢測報告不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據，但因共用 IEC 61547 基礎，檢測內容重疊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard; aligned with IEC 61547)

gap.en: Both Peru (NTP-IEC 61547) and China (GB/T 18595) derive from IEC 61547, so immunity test content is largely shared. Differences: (1) Peru has no horizontal EMC Directive — immunity is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope; otherwise the NTP is a reference. In China, GB/T 18595 is recommended-only and not universally enforced — so neither market mandates lighting immunity as broadly as the EU does; (2) Chinese GB/T 18595 reports are not accepted as Peruvian conformity evidence — an accredited IEC 61547 report eases acceptance; (3) surge/dip tests should reflect 60 Hz, 220 V Peruvian network conditions (China 50 Hz). Practically, a product already tested to IEC 61547 (via GB/T 18595 or a CB report) has a reduced re-testing burden, but the evidence must be in a form Peru's importer/conformity route accepts.
gap.zh: 秘鲁（NTP-IEC 61547）与中国（GB/T 18595）均源自 IEC 61547，抗扰度检测内容基本共用。差异：（1）秘鲁没有横向 EMC 指令——仅当技术规范宣布该类别纳入范围时抗扰度才为强制；否则 NTP 仅为参考。中国 GB/T 18595 仅为推荐性，未普遍执行——故两市场对照明抗扰度的强制程度均不及欧盟；（2）中国 GB/T 18595 报告不被接受为秘鲁合格评定证据——经认可的 IEC 61547 报告可便于接受；（3）浪涌/暂降试验应反映 60 Hz、220 V 秘鲁电网条件（中国 50 Hz）。实际上，已按 IEC 61547 测试（经 GB/T 18595 或 CB 报告）的产品可减少重新测试负担，但证据须为秘鲁进口商/合格评定路径所接受的形式。
gap.zht: 秘魯（NTP-IEC 61547）與中國（GB/T 18595）均源自 IEC 61547，抗擾度檢測內容基本共用。差異：（1）秘魯沒有橫向 EMC 指令——僅當技術規範宣布該類別納入範圍時抗擾度才為強制；否則 NTP 僅為參考。中國 GB/T 18595 僅為推薦性，未普遍執行——故兩市場對照明抗擾度的強制程度均不及歐盟；（2）中國 GB/T 18595 報告不被接受為秘魯合格評定證據——經認可的 IEC 61547 報告可便於接受；（3）浪湧/暫降試驗應反映 60 Hz、220 V 秘魯電網條件（中國 50 Hz）。實際上，已按 IEC 61547 測試（經 GB/T 18595 或 CB 報告）的產品可減少重新測試負擔，但證據須為秘魯進口商/合格評定路徑所接受的形式。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no horizontal EMC Directive in Peru; NTP-IEC 61547 immunity is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) declares the category in scope, otherwise reference/voluntary
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

source.publisher: INACAL (Instituto Nacional de Calidad) — Gobierno del Peru

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru has no horizontal EMC Directive; lighting immunity follows NTP-IEC 61547 and is mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico declares the category in scope. The IEC 61547 base is shared with China's GB/T 18595 (a recommended-only Chinese standard), so neither market enforces lighting immunity as broadly as the EU. Chinese reports are not accepted as Peruvian evidence; an accredited IEC 61547 report eases acceptance. Reflect 220 V, 60 Hz network conditions in surge/dip testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁没有横向 EMC 指令；照明抗扰度依据 NTP-IEC 61547，仅在技术规范宣布该类别纳入范围时为强制。IEC 61547 基础与中国 GB/T 18595（仅为推荐性的中国标准）共用，故两市场对照明抗扰度的强制程度均不及欧盟。中国报告不被接受为秘鲁证据；经认可的 IEC 61547 报告可便于接受。浪涌/暂降试验请反映 220 V、60 Hz 电网条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯沒有橫向 EMC 指令；照明抗擾度依據 NTP-IEC 61547，僅在技術規範宣布該類別納入範圍時為強制。IEC 61547 基礎與中國 GB/T 18595（僅為推薦性的中國標準）共用，故兩市場對照明抗擾度的強制程度均不及歐盟。中國報告不被接受為秘魯證據；經認可的 IEC 61547 報告可便於接受。浪湧/暫降試驗請反映 220 V、60 Hz 電網條件。
